programmes.show_description: (2014) Comedy with Diane Keaton and Michael Douglas. A cranky, self-centred realtor is forced to let people in when he's left in charge of his grandchild. Doesn't everybody need good neighbours?
Six U.S. agents have to protect a key witness in a major drug case from being murdered by the drug dealers he is going to testify against. Starring Luke Goss and Steven Seagal (2016).

programmes.show_description: With access to the UK's Maritime Coastguard Agency and Mountain Rescue Teams, follow the extraordinary men and women who put their own lives at risk to save members of the public 24/7.

(2019) Tense thriller starring Kristina Klebe. A recently widowed woman grows suspicious of her insular son's new friend. Could his seemingly strange obsession with her turn sinister?
(2018) Tense thriller starring Rosslyn Luke. Happy to be reunited at first, a woman quickly realises her former best friend has sinister plans to hold her and her family hostage.
(2019) Cradle-robbing thriller with Clare Kramer. Jessica is shocked when her daughter starts dating an older man. But that soon turns to terror when she discovers her lethal connection to him...

(2020) Twist-laden thriller with Karynn Moore. When her wealthy estranged sister dies, Carly is shocked to be named guardian of her daughter. But someone's plans didn't include a long-lost relative...
(2020) Thriller starring Lindsay Hartley. Two families are thrown into crisis when they discover their daughters were switched at birth - but nothing will stop one mother keeping what's hers...
A group of scientists need to prevent the world from entering a new ice age. Starring Jeff Fahey and Erika Eleniak (2006).
(2015) Action with Mark Lutz. When an asteroid threatens to obliterate Earth, a discredited astrophysicist is humanity's last hope. Armed with cutting-edge tech, can he prevent a global disaster?
Former British secret agent Harry Palmer is dropped into the Russian criminal underworld when he receives a job to recover a consignment of stolen plutonium. Stars Michael Caine, Jason Connery (1996)
(2022) Unsettling psychological thriller starring Eva Green. A fashion designer suffers from a puzzling illness that confounds her doctors - until a mysterious caregiver reveals a horrifying truth...
(2018) Action-packed abduction thriller with Bruce Willis. When his fiancée is kidnapped by sex traffickers, a former US Army Ranger and his brothers join forces with a veteran detective to find her.

(2008) Action with Eric Roberts. A deranged officer hijacks a nuclear submarine, triggering deep-sea drama. It's mutiny, missiles and mayhem beneath the waves - and the wrong decision could sink them.

programmes.show_name: Disaster Zone: Volcano in New York
programmes.show_description: (2006) Fiery drama with Michael Ironside. Things heat up when an underground experiment blows the lid off Manhattan - literally. With lava in the streets, a construction crew must plug the meltdown.
(2015) Sci-Fi action with Mike Dopud. A fractured family is caught up in a lethal lightning storm. Amidst the terror and destruction, can they find a way to unite and survive?
(2011) Red-hot action adventure with Rachel Hunter. Can a volcano expert blow the whistle on an illegal oil drilling operation before it sets off a city-destroying super-volcano beneath Miami?
(2014) Sci-fi action with Alexandra Paul, Zoe Barker and Nigel Barber. When a new, highly explosive energy source seeps into the Earth's crust, can its creator save humanity from being extinguished?
A TV weatherman tries to find a way to stop devastating winds from ravaging the Earth. Starring David Chokachi, Ruth Kearney and Steven Hartley (2013).
No further information...
(2006) Captivating drama with Sarah Wynter. The lonely wife of a prison warden falls for an inmate she believes is innocent and helps him escape, only to make a shocking discovery about his motives.
A CIA agent has to stop Islamic terrorists from teaming up with Mexican cartels to smuggle weapons of mass destruction into the U.S.
(2015) Sci-fi action with Ethan Hawke and Succession's Sarah Snook. A temporal agent who stops crimes before they happen is tasked with catching a fugitive who's always one step ahead in time.
